1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)

<main>

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 aria-level="3" class="accordion-item__title-wrapper" role="heading"> <button aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-item__click-target" style=" padding-top: 30px; padding-b
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 aria-level="3" class="accordion-item__title-wrapper" role="heading"> <button aria-expanded="false" class="accordion-item__click-target" style=" padding-top: 30px; padding-b
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header-nav-list"> <div class="header-nav-item header-nav-item--folder"> <button aria-controls="politikk" aria-expanded="false" class="header-nav-folder-title" data-animation-role="header-e
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

4.1.1 Parsing (9 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'header' appears 2 times

<svg class="icon icon--cart" height="49" viewbox="0 0 61 49" width="61"> <path clip-rule="evenodd" d="M0.5 2C0.5 1.17157 1.17157 0.5 2 0.5H13.6362C14.3878 0.5 15.0234 1.05632 15.123 1.80135L16.431 11.
